prescribed.
UK = Unknown CHAR 2 x x
M0790_CU_INHAL_MED (M0790) Current Management of Inhalant Medications Current ability to prepare and take inhalant/ mist medications. 00 = Able to independently take the correct medication and proper dosage at the correct times.
01 = Able to take medication at the correct times if: (a) individual dosages are prepared in advance by another person, OR (b) given daily reminders.
02 = Unable to take medication unless administered by someone else.
NA = NA - No
